title: Methods (Actions) 🏃
description: Give your objects the power to DO things using functions.

slides.title: Bringing Objects to Life ⚡
slides.content:
# Not Just Data

So far, our objects only hold data (Properties). They exist, but they don't DO anything.
To make an object powerful, we can put **Functions** inside the class!

When a function lives inside a class, we call it a **Method**.

slides.title: Adding an Action 👊

quizData.question: What is the specific term used for a Function that lives inside a Class?
quizData.explanation: While it functions exactly like a function, when it belongs to a Class we call it a 'Method'.

slides.title: Calling the Method 📣

quizData.explanation: The dot (.) operator is used to access both Properties (p.name) and Methods (p.jump()).

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: Methods can make objects interact perfectly with themselves without messy external code.
